promotion-basis: round6 2026-06-20 — #4 score-determinism GREEN: byte-identical goldens across N=3 independent Browserbase captures (replayCorpus + normalize). #4 is the load-bearing promotion criterion (corpus/README.md) and proves all #3 capture-determinism residual drift score-neutral. rebless-v1.1.0: 2026-06-21 — golden re-blessed for extractor v1.1.0 (completeness, 'catch everything'). collect now keeps interaction-gated surfaces (mega-menus, collapsed mobile nav, tab panels, accordions) with visible:false instead of dropping them; the content was already inside the frozen MHTML, the loss was extractor-side. Recovery: 138 visible -> 303 total (+165 hidden, incl. the full 106-item nav IA + 30 dropdown CTAs). Determinism: SAME-capture round-trip GREEN (snapshot diff byte-identical, full suite 108 passed). CROSS-capture #4 for the new hidden axis is NOT yet re-proven on fresh N=3 (the retained run-0 sample predates the round6 carousel-pinning epoch, so its drift is dominated by score-neutral carousel rotation, not the hidden set; set-level check showed hidden nav ~97.6% stable). Re-affirming full v1.0.0-grade promotion at v1.1.0 requires a fresh N>=3 post-pinning freeze + replay-through-v1.1.0 byte-identical-goldens check (deferred, Browserbase).
